metadata.question:
Hi, I'm making a pie but I could use some help with my shopping list. I have everything I need for the crust, but I'm not sure about the filling. I got the recipe from my friend Aditi, but she left it as a voice memo and the speaker on my phone is buzzing so I can't quite make out what she's saying. Could you please listen to the recipe and list all of the ingredients that my friend described? I only want the ingredients for the filling, as I have everything I need to make my favorite pie crust. I've attached the recipe as Strawberry pie.mp3.

In your response, please only list the ingredients, not any measurements. So if the recipe calls for "a pinch of salt" or "two cups of ripe strawberries" the ingredients on the list would be "salt" and "ripe strawberries".

Please format your response as a comma separated list of ingredients. Also, please alphabetize the ingredients.
metadata.ground_truth: cornstarch, freshly squeezed lemon juice, granulated sugar, pure vanilla extract, ripe strawberries
metadata.mistake_reason: The Culinary_Expert incorrectly included 'salt' as an ingredient and misinterpreted 'fresh strawberries' as 'ripe strawberries' from the transcription.

system_description.Culinary_Expert:
## Your role
Culinary_Expert is a seasoned culinary professional with specialized skills in identifying and listing ingredients in various pie fillings by analyzing transcriptions.

## Task and skill instructions
- You will be responsible for examining transcriptions of recipes or culinary descriptions to identify and list every ingredient used in the pie fillings.
- This role requires a deep understanding of common and uncommon pie ingredients, along with the ability to accurately parse and interpret written culinary information.
- Attention to detail is critical to ensure no ingredient is overlooked or incorrectly identified.
- Additional skills that may be beneficial include familiarity with a wide range of culinary terms and ingredients, as well as experience with recipe analysis and transcription interpretation.
